methodsAttempted.query: site:uquebec.ca Université du Québec intelligence artificielle générative ChatGPT étudiants enseignement politique
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found the central UQ press release, the central Docuthèque principles PDF, and several UQTR-specific documents.
Firecrawl search returned the central principles PDF plus UQTR administrative/student/research guidance and event pages.
Firecrawl search confirmed the central press release and PDF as the most relevant network-level sources and also found an official pedagogy webinar page.
robots.txt was fetched and did not disallow the verified reseau.uquebec.ca press-release path or the docutheque.uquebec.ca PDF path.
The official press release links directly to the Docuthèque record for the Énoncé de principes.
The Docuthèque PDF was fetched and parsed as the primary source for substantive principles.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located a central Université du Québec press release and its linked Docuthèque PDF for a network-level Énoncé de principes on responsible generative AI use in formation and research. UQTR-specific guidance and a pedagogy webinar were documented but rejected for this central UQ entity because they are local or event/training sources rather than the network-level principles statement.

stopConditions: Stop after central UQ-controlled sources support direct network-level claim candidates.
Do not infer central UQ policy from UQTR-only documents or event pages.
Preserve French evidence snippets as canonical source evidence.

artifacts.claimText: Université du Québec states that its Conseil des études adopted a network-level principles statement on responsible use of generative AI in formation and research.

citation.citationTitle: L'Université du Québec prend position sur l'utilisation de l'intelligence artificielle en contexte universitaire
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Université du Québec's principles state that when generative AI is used in formation or research, the university member remains responsible for work quality and consequences, and AI must not replace human judgment and responsibility.

citation.citationTitle: Énoncé de principes sur l'utilisation responsable de l'intelligence artificielle générative dans les activités de formation et de recherche
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Université du Québec's principles state that significant use of generative AI should be explicitly mentioned, including how and to what extent it was used.

artifacts.claimText: Université du Québec's principles frame generative AI use in formation and research around intellectual integrity, critical and proportionate use, and understanding of AI's operation and risks.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Énoncé de principes sur l'utilisation responsable de l'intelligence artificielle générative dans les activités de formation et de recherche
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Lorsqu’il fait appel à l’intelligence artificielle générative dans le cadre de la formation ou de la recherche, l’universitaire demeure responsable de la qualité de son travail et imputable des conséquences de ses actions.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: When generative AI is used for formation or research, the university member remains responsible for work quality and consequences.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Énoncé de principes sur l'utilisation responsable de l'intelligence artificielle générative dans les activités de formation et de recherche
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Toute utilisation significative de l'IAg doit être explicitement mentionnée, en précisant comment et dans quelle mesure elle a été utilisée.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Any significant use of generative AI should be explicitly mentioned, including how and to what extent it was used.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Énoncé de principes sur l'utilisation responsable de l'intelligence artificielle générative dans les activités de formation et de recherche
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Lorsqu’elle s’inscrit dans une démarche de formation, l’utilisation de l’IAg doit contribuer à l’atteinte de ses objectifs, ce qui suppose un alignement pédagogique soigneusement réfléchi ainsi qu’un usage critique et proportionné.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For formation, generative AI use should support objectives and involve carefully considered pedagogical alignment plus critical, proportionate use.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: L'utilisation de l’IAg dans les activités de formation et de recherche universitaires doit être fondée sur une compréhension adéquate de ses principes généraux de fonctionnement.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Énoncé de principes sur l'utilisation responsable de l'intelligence artificielle générative dans les activités de formation et de recherche
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: À moins d’une autorisation expresse des autorités compétentes, les requêtes faites à un système d’IAg public ne doivent pas comprendre d’informations confidentielles ou de renseignements personnels qui ne sont pas publiquement accessibles.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Unless expressly authorized by competent authorities, prompts to public generative AI systems must not include confidential information or non-public personal information.

artifacts.title: Université du Québec generative AI principles staged update
artifacts.summary: Staged candidate claims document Université du Québec's 2025 network-level principles statement on responsible generative AI use in formation and research, including human responsibility, transparency, integrity, informed use, and confidentiality boundaries.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
UQTR-specific documents were excluded from central Université du Québec claims because they are local institutional sources.
The staged claims reflect principles and guidance language; they should not be promoted as exhaustive course-level rules or disciplinary procedures without further official sources.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
